scripts.db:push:supabase: npm run prisma:prepare:postgres && npx prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.postgres.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate:postgres: npm run prisma:prepare:postgres && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.postgres.prisma
scripts.migrate:supabase: npm run prisma:prepare:postgres && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.sqlite-migrate.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.postgres-migrate.prisma && node scripts/migrate-sqlite-to-postgres.mjs
scripts.setup: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
